LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_Vertibird.description: Vertibird is a designation for a series of vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft. These multipurpose tiltrotor aircraft were developed by the United States military and rapidly became a primary gunship and transport aircraft. This one is now in use by the 英克雷.
LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_Vertibird.label: 英克雷 vertibird
LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_VertibirdIncoming.label: 英克雷 vertibird (incoming)
LanguageData.FCP_Enclave_VertibirdLeaving.label: 英克雷 vertibird (leaving)
